# PraetorX — Odoo 19 Module Suite

> Professional Odoo 19 modules by Syntax & Sabotage. AI-powered invoicing, document management, BPMN process design, and enterprise cloud integrations.

## Company

- Name: Syntax & Sabotage
- Author: Lars Weiler
- Website: https://syntaxandsabotage.io
- Support: support@syntaxandsabotage.io
- Product site: https://praetorx.net
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/browse?author=Syntax+%26+Sabotage

## Modules (Paid)

### Vault — 199 EUR
Intelligent document management with AI classification, routing, OCR, retention policies, and ISO 27001 security levels.
- Technical: praetorx_vault
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/praetorx_vault/
- Depends: foundation, documents, mail

### SharePoint Sync — 99 EUR
Bidirectional sync between Odoo Documents and SharePoint/OneDrive via Microsoft Graph API.
- Technical: sharepoint_sync
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/sharepoint_sync/
- Depends: base, documents, mail, praetorx_base

### Nextcloud Sync — 99 EUR
Bidirectional sync between Odoo Documents and Nextcloud. Libraries, folders, and files.
- Technical: praetorx_nextcloud_sync
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/praetorx_nextcloud_sync/
- Depends: base, documents, mail, praetorx_base

### FlowForge Engine — 99 EUR
BPMN execution engine. Tasks, timers, gateways, and events as Odoo actions.
- Technical: praetorx_flowforge_engine
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/praetorx_flowforge_engine/
- Depends: praetorx_flowforge, praetorx_base, portal

### MCP Security — 79 EUR
Model Context Protocol security and access control for AI-powered Odoo integrations.
- Technical: praetorx_security
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/praetorx_security/
- Depends: base, mail, rpc

### Invoice Pro — 49 EUR
AI-powered invoice processing with automatic data extraction, validation, and Odoo Accounting integration.
- Technical: invoice_pro
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/invoice_pro/
- Depends: base, mail, account, web, portal, account_accountant

### FlowForge — 49 EUR
BPMN 2.0 process designer with visual form builder.
- Technical: praetorx_flowforge
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/praetorx_flowforge/
- Depends: base, web, mail

### Mimik Ingest — 49 EUR
SharePoint API compatible endpoint for scanners. Captures documents directly into Odoo.
- Technical: nexumis_mimik_ingest
- App Store: https://apps.odoo.com/apps/modules/19.0/nexumis_mimik_ingest/
- Depends: praetorx_vault, documents

## Modules (Free)

### Foundation — Free
Core services: unified AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Azure), configuration, health monitoring, security framework.
- Technical: foundation
- Depends: base, mail

### PraetorX Base — Free
Queue jobs, validation framework, batch processing. Shared infrastructure for integration modules.
- Technical: praetorx_base
- Depends: base, mail, web

### Scribe — Free
Markdown-to-HTML conversion for any Odoo HTML field. Powerbox command, live preview, GitHub Flavored Markdown.
- Technical: scribe
- Depends: web, html_editor

### FlowForge Knowledge — Free
Embed BPMN diagrams in Odoo Knowledge articles.
- Technical: praetorx_flowforge_knowledge
- Depends: praetorx_flowforge, knowledge

## Compliance

- ISO 27001 compliant
- DSGVO (GDPR) compliant
- GoBD compliant
- 100% Odoo-native (ORM only, no raw SQL)

## Technical

- Platform: Odoo 19 Enterprise
- License: OPL-1 (paid), LGPL-3 (free)
- Language: Python, JavaScript (OWL), XML, SCSS

## Optional: llms-full.txt

For the complete module catalog with detailed feature lists, see: https://praetorx.net/llms-full.txt
